question: How many customers are there in total?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer) RETURN count(c) AS total_customers

question: How many orders have been placed?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) RETURN count(o) AS total_orders

question: How many sellers are there?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Seller) RETURN count(s) AS total_sellers

question: How many products are in the graph?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) RETURN count(p) AS total_products

question: List all unique order statuses.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) RETURN DISTINCT o.status AS status

question: List all unique product categories.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) RETURN DISTINCT p.category AS category

question: How many reviews have a score of 5?
gold_cypher: MATCH (r:Review {score: 5}) RETURN count(r) AS five_star_reviews

question: How many orders have status delivered?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order {status: 'delivered'}) RETURN count(o) AS delivered_orders

question: List all unique states where customers are located.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer) RETURN DISTINCT c.state AS state

question: How many orders have a review?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) RETURN count(DISTINCT o) AS orders_with_reviews

question: How many customers are from Sao Paulo state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'SP'}) RETURN count(c) AS customers_in_sp

question: How many orders were cancelled?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order {status: 'canceled'}) RETURN count(o) AS cancelled_orders

question: How many reviews have a score less than 3?
gold_cypher: MATCH (r:Review) WHERE r.score < 3 RETURN count(r) AS low_score_reviews

question: How many sellers are from Rio de Janeiro state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Seller {state: 'RJ'}) RETURN count(s) AS sellers_in_rj

question: List all product categories that contain the word cama.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.category CONTAINS 'cama' RETURN DISTINCT p.category AS category

question: How many orders were placed by customers from Minas Gerais state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'MG'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order) RETURN count(o) AS orders_from_mg

question: How many products belong to the esporte_lazer category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product {category: 'esporte_lazer'}) RETURN count(p) AS products_in_category

question: How many orders have a review score of 1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review {score: 1}) RETURN count(o) AS one_star_orders

question: How many sellers are from Sao Paulo state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Seller {state: 'SP'}) RETURN count(s) AS sellers_in_sp

question: How many customers are from the city of Rio de Janeiro?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {city: 'rio de janeiro'}) RETURN count(c) AS customers_in_rio

question: What is the average review score across all orders?
gold_cypher: MATCH (r:Review) RETURN avg(r.score) AS avg_review_score

question: Which product category has the most products?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) RETURN p.category AS category, count(p) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which state has the most customers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer) RETURN c.state AS state, count(c) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most common order status?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) WITH o.status AS status, count(o) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN status

question: How many orders does each seller have?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN s.seller_id AS seller, count(DISTINCT o) AS total_orders ORDER BY total_orders DESC

question: Which city has the most sellers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Seller) RETURN s.city AS city, count(s) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average review score per product category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product), (o)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) RETURN p.category AS category, avg(r.score) AS avg_score ORDER BY avg_score DESC

question: How many orders were placed per state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order) RETURN c.state AS state, count(o) AS total_orders ORDER BY total_orders DESC

question: Which seller has sold products in the most orders?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN s.seller_id AS seller, count(DISTINCT o) AS total_orders ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many products has each seller sold?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN s.seller_id AS seller, count(p) AS total_products ORDER BY total_products DESC

question: Which customers placed orders that received a review score of 5?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review {score: 5}) RETURN DISTINCT c.customer_id AS customer_id

question: Which sellers sold products in orders that were cancelled?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order {status: 'canceled'})-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN DISTINCT s.seller_id AS seller_id

question: Which product categories were ordered by customers from Sao Paulo state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'SP'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product) RETURN DISTINCT p.category AS category

question: How many customers from Rio de Janeiro state placed orders with a review score of 1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'RJ'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review {score: 1}) RETURN count(DISTINCT c) AS customers

question: Which sellers sold products to customers from Minas Gerais?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'MG'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN DISTINCT s.seller_id AS seller_id

question: What product categories did customers from SP order that got a 5 star review?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'SP'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review {score: 5}), (o)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product) RETURN DISTINCT p.category AS category

question: Which customers placed more than one order?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order) WITH c, count(o) AS total WHERE total > 1 RETURN c.customer_id AS customer_id, total ORDER BY total DESC

question: Which sellers have only received 1 star reviews?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller), (o)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) WITH s, collect(DISTINCT r.score) AS scores WHERE all(score IN scores WHERE score = 1) RETURN s.seller_id AS seller_id

question: How many distinct product categories were ordered by customers from each state?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product) RETURN c.state AS state, count(DISTINCT p.category) AS distinct_categories ORDER BY distinct_categories DESC

question: Which product categories have an average review score above 4?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product), (o)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) WITH p.category AS category, avg(r.score) AS avg_score WHERE avg_score > 4 RETURN category, avg_score ORDER BY avg_score DESC

question: Which customers placed orders containing products from more than one seller?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) WITH c, o, count(DISTINCT s) AS seller_count WHERE seller_count > 1 RETURN DISTINCT c.customer_id AS customer_id

question: What is the average review score for orders placed by customers from SP?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'SP'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) RETURN avg(r.score) AS avg_score

question: Which sellers sold products that were ordered by customers from more than 3 different states?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) WITH s, count(DISTINCT c.state) AS state_count WHERE state_count > 3 RETURN s.seller_id AS seller_id, state_count ORDER BY state_count DESC

question: How many orders containing products in the informatica_acessorios category received a review score below 3?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product {category: 'informatica_acessorios'}), (o)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) WHERE r.score < 3 RETURN count(DISTINCT o) AS orders

question: Which states have customers who ordered products from sellers in SP?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller {state: 'SP'}) RETURN DISTINCT c.state AS customer_state

question: What is the most ordered product category by customers from RJ?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'RJ'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product) RETURN p.category AS category, count(o) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which sellers have sold products across the most product categories?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller) RETURN s.seller_id AS seller_id, count(DISTINCT p.category) AS category_count ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many orders placed by customers from SP contained products sold by sellers also from SP?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {state: 'SP'})-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:CONTAINS]->(p:Product)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:Seller {state: 'SP'}) RETURN count(DISTINCT o) AS orders

question: Which product categories have never received a review score below 2?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:CONTAINS]-(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) WITH p.category AS category, min(r.score) AS min_score WHERE min_score >= 2 RETURN category ORDER BY category

question: How many customers placed orders with all 5 star reviews?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PLACED]->(o:Order)-[:HAS_REVIEW]->(r:Review) WITH c, collect(r.score) AS scores WHERE all(s IN scores WHERE s = 5) RETURN count(DISTINCT c) AS customers
